notice: 1.3.1 is here: clearer Walls & Partitions sheets with how-to notes, a tidier centered template, and a red highlight + Check that catch a repeated Wall #/Partition # in the same space before you push.
notes: 1.3.1 - a cleaner, clearer template: the Walls and Partitions sheets now have how-to notes, every row is formatted the same, all cells are centered, and long headers/notes are no longer cut off. New: a repeated Wall # or Partition # in the same space is highlighted in red and is caught by Check before push (HAP needs unique numbers; a space has at most 2 partitions, numbered 1 and 2). Just click Update now.
